name: Conkey Ave Courts
description: Conkey Ave Courts is a place to play pickleball in Norwich, NY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Hidden Springs Brewhouse
description: Come play pickleball at Hidden Springs Brewhouse in Norwich, NY! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to food and restrooms. The court is free.

name: Norwich YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Norwich YMCA in Norwich, NY! There are 12 wood courts. 6 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and locker rooms.

name: Weiler Park
description: Come play pickleball at Weiler Park in Norwich, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
